XFindFirstNickname

The XFindFirstNickname function begins an enumeration of nicknames in the local nickname cache and returns the first found nickname.

HANDLE XFindFirstNickname(
    BOOL fThisTitleOnly,
    LPWSTR lpNickname,
    UINT uSize
);

Parameters

fThisTitleOnly
[in] Flag indicating whether the search is limited to nicknames associated with the current title. If TRUE, the enumeration will contain only those nicknames that were added to the cache by the current title. If FALSE, all nicknames in the cache will be enumerated.
lpNickname
[out] Pointer to a buffer that receives the first enumerated nickname. Nicknames are limited to MAX_NICKNAME characters (including the terminating null character).
uSize
[in] The size, in characters, of the lpNickname buffer.

Return Values

If the function succeeds, the return value is a search handle that can be used in subsequent calls to XFindNextNickname.

If the function fails, the return value is INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE.

If the function fails, it does not call SetLastError. A title cannot call GetLastError for extended error information.

Remarks

XFindFirstNickname opens a search handle and returns the first nickname from the local nickname cache. The search handle can then be used in XFindNextNickname to continue enumeration of the nickname cache. When the search handle is no longer needed, close it using the XFindClose function.

Nicknames that will not fit in a buffer of uSize characters will be skipped. This allows a title to use the uSize parameter to filter the results of the enumeration to only those nicknames with a length that the title is capable of displaying. The calculation includes the terminating null character. So for example, to request only nicknames with three or fewer characters, specify 4 for uSize.

The nicknames are returned in order from the newest in the cache to the oldest.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xbox.h, for include use Xtl.h.
Import Library: Use Xapilib.lib
Unicode: Implemented as Unicode only.

See Also

XFindNextNickname, XFindClose, XSetNickname
